title: BYOH Task Input
description: JSON payload sent to agent containers via stdin (ephemeral mode) or returned by GET .../tasks/next (persistent mode).

taskId.description: Unique task identifier assigned by sera-core.

task.description: Task description or prompt to be executed by the agent.

context.description: Optional additional context to supplement the task prompt.

examples.task: List all Python files in /workspace and count the lines in each
